name: Get On The School Bus
recent_news: No public web presence located; HQ address (216 Bell Canyon Rd) is inside a private gated residential community (Bell Canyon, Ventura County) - inconsistent with an operating school-bus yard.
fit_notes: Not verifiable as an operating contractor. Likely sub-scale owner-operator or possible source-data artifact; not a credible Summit tuck-in candidate without ground-truth confirmation.

name: MO Flo Inc Which Will Do Bus
recent_news: Name appears to be a truncated California 'doing business as' filing ('Which Will Do Business As ...'). Registered address (13976 Fox Glove Dr, Moorpark) is a 2014-built single-family home, not a bus yard. No operating school-bus presence found on the open web.
fit_notes: Almost certainly not an active school-bus operator - more likely an LLC/DBA shell or data-pipeline artifact. Not a Summit tuck-in target.

name: Massini Bus Co Inc
principals: Dawn S. Massini (President); Gregg S. Massini (related entity 'Gregg S. Massini Bus Company, Inc.')
districts_or_customers: Berkshire Hills Regional School District (50+ year incumbent contractor); also referenced in Southern Berkshire Regional School District bid documents via Gregg S. Massini Bus Co. subcontracting
recent_news: 2025 - Massini was sole bidder on the Berkshire Hills Regional School District contract, but bid was deemed non-responsive; at the rebid Massini withdrew and the contract went to Dufour Bus (loss of longstanding anchor account). FMCSA Sept 2022 review: Satisfactory rating; 20 power units / 16 drivers; zero reportable crashes in trailing 24 months.
fit_notes: Classic family-owned, 60+ year, ~20-bus rural MA operator with second-generation involvement (Dawn and Gregg Massini) - strong succession setup. BUT the 2025 loss of the Berkshire Hills district (essentially their entire revenue base) materially impairs the business; Summit interest would be primarily for the DOT authority, yard, drivers and re-entry into Berkshire County routes rather than ongoing cash flow. Worth a low-cost outreach call given the distress angle.

name: Eyes On Inc Which Will Do Bus
recent_news: California corporation incorporated Feb 16, 2006; registered DBA 'Nancy Pasquan & Associates' - a quality-assurance / consulting business (per LinkedIn, Alignable, bizprofile.net), not a school-bus operator. Source-data name ('Which Will Do Bus...') is a truncation of 'Which Will Do Business As'.
fit_notes: Misclassified - this is a QA consulting firm, not a school-bus operator. Drop from Summit target universe.

name: Gatsby Inc Which Will Do Bus
recent_news: California corporation registered at 7452 Draper Ave, La Jolla doing business as 'Gatsby Writers Group, Inc.' Source-data name ('Which Will Do Bus...') is a truncation of 'Which Will Do Business As'. No school-bus operations identified.
fit_notes: Misclassified - this is a writers' group / publishing entity, not a school-bus operator. Drop from Summit target universe.
